scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,worker -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @huepf/shared-types && npm run build -w @huepf/backend && npm run build -w @huepf/worker && npm run build -w @huepf/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @huepf/shared-types && npm run typecheck -w @huepf/backend && npm run typecheck -w @huepf/worker && npm run typecheck -w @huepf/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @huepf/frontend && npm run lint -w @huepf/backend && npm run lint -w @huepf/worker
